Ntc Of Motion To Amend The Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. dba Great Western Collection Bureau's Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non-Party Alter Ego is Granted. No opposition filed. (The court signed the proposed Order submitted with the moving papers.) Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions.
To be heard at 9:00am on the Discovery Calendar at Line 9. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Assignee Creditors Trade Association, Inc'S Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jan-30-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances - Tentative ruling is adopted. Based on no appearances the parties deemed stipulatded to have matter decided by Judge Pro Tem.

Ruling - Assignee Creditors Trade Association,Inc's motion to compel answers to Post judgment discovery and sanctions as follow: Defendants, United Heritage Industries, Inc. A California Corporation DBA E0BRLD and Kevin Hampton will provide to Plaintiff full and complete responses without objection to Plaintiff's First Set of Post Judgment Interrogatories and Plaintiff's Post Judgment Demand for Production of Documents and Tangible Things In Accordance with Certain Provisions of Labor Code Section 98.2 no later than the close of business on February 14, 2012.
(2) Defendants, United Heritage Industries, Inc. a California Corporation DBA EBRLD and Kevin Hampton shall either individually or jointly pay to Plaintiff the sum of $600.00 as sanctions. Prevailing party to prepare form of order. Paul Renne Judge Pro Tem, not reported. - 302/JPT

Notice And Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Kevin Hampton As Judgment Debtor
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
ASSIGNEE CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S Motion To Amend The Judgment To Add Non Party Alter Ego, Kevin Hampton As Judgment Debtor IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter, Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 =301/PJB
